creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is incorrect as 62e30a7  doesn't not correspond to the release tag. You should pull in additional patching using either files/patch-.... or PATCH_SITES and PATCHFILES (use full git hash)

In this case I'd advise you to read the Porters Handbook ( https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github )
Example 16 or possible 18 are what you're looking for

Best regards,
Daniel
